feed.title: Jakub Ledwoń
feed.subtitle: Jakub Ledwoń's blog, Software Engineer building Android apps and more

entry.title: Peeking into Android traffic: SSL Proxying and System Certificates

link.title: Peeking into Android traffic: SSL Proxying and System Certificates

entry.summary: As you continue on your Android debugging journey, you encounter a curious issue. There seems to be a problem with the data your app is sending to its server. So, you pull up your favorite proxy tool to take a closer look at the traffic. Before you know it, you’ve identified the problem and a fix is already brewing in your mind. But then, an interesting thought pops up: “What if I tried to chec...

entry.title: Streamlining Android proxy setup with a custom bash function

link.title: Streamlining Android proxy setup with a custom bash function

entry.summary: As an Android developer or tester, you have likely had to deal with the challenges of intercepting network traffic for an Android device. Tools like Charles or Proxyman can be very useful in these scenarios, providing an intuitive way to monitor and manipulate the network requests and responses. But before these tools can work their magic, you first have to set up the proxy settings on your And...
